history.created_by: RUN |1 version=21.0.11.10.1 /bin/sh -c wget -O /THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-20200824.tar.gz https://corretto.aws/downloads/resources/licenses/alpine/THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-20200824.tar.gz &&     echo "82f3e50e71b2aee21321b2b33de372feed5befad6ef2196ddec92311bc09becb  /THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-20200824.tar.gz" | sha256sum -c - &&     tar x -ovzf THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-20200824.tar.gz &&     rm -rf THIRD-PARTY-LICENSES-20200824.tar.gz &&     wget -O /etc/apk/keys/amazoncorretto.rsa.pub https://apk.corretto.aws/amazoncorretto.rsa.pub &&     SHA_SUM="6cfdf08be09f32ca298e2d5bd4a359ee2b275765c09b56d514624bf831eafb91" &&     echo "${SHA_SUM}  /etc/apk/keys/amazoncorretto.rsa.pub" | sha256sum -c - &&     echo "https://apk.corretto.aws" >> /etc/apk/repositories &&     apk add --no-cache amazon-corretto-21=$version-r0 &&     rm -rf /usr/lib/jvm/java-21-amazon-corretto/lib/src.zip # buildkit
